MANHATTAN COMMUNITY BOARD 11
Full Board Meeting
Monday, June 10, 2024, 6:30 PM
55 East 115th Street, New York, NY 10029

AGENDA

Item 1. Fiscal Year 2025 Budget Hearing — Capital and Expense Priorities

Community Board 11 will hold its annual Fiscal Year 2025 budget hearing. The Board will hear testimony from residents and community organizations regarding capital and expense budget priorities for East Harlem and El Barrio. Priority areas include housing preservation, street infrastructure, park improvements, and public school facilities.

There are no land use or ULURP matters associated with this agenda item. All residents of Community District 11 are encouraged to attend and testify.
title: Fiscal Year 2025 Budget Hearing — Capital and Expense Priorities, Community Board 11
summary: Community Board 11 (East Harlem) annual FY2025 budget hearing on capital and expense priorities including housing preservation, street infrastructure, parks, and schools.
